Not listed anywhere in Appendix A (verified against the 2026 extraction) — a true NOC car. Resolves via the Street FS catch-all: 'V8 sedans, pick-ups, and sedan-derived convertibles (NOC)'; per §12 a wagon seating 4+ is a sedan. ST: >5.1L N/A fits the BST catch-all. Regional only. Attributes reflect the 5.7L LT1; the 4.3L L99 V8 also qualifies.
